", recipients="") ]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters from `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml` and put together a summary.

Quick summary for Dr. Martinez:

- **CU-001**: 34 months, **12.4 kg**, **0.15 mg/kg**, est. dose **1.86 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-14**, PK clearance **3.2 mL/min**
  - Note: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan.

- **CU-002**: 18 months, **9.1 kg**, **0.12 mg/kg**, est. dose **1.09 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**, PK clearance **2.8 mL/min**
  - Note: Responding well; weight gain improving.

- **CU-003**: 51 months, **15.7 kg**, **0.18 mg/kg**, est. dose **2.83 mg**, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**, PK clearance **4.1 mL/min**
  - Note: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27.

On PK model stability: **nothing in the dosing config itself looks inconsistent** — the patient parameters are populated and coherent. That said, **I have not run a live validation or model health check here**, so I can only say the current config looks sound, not that the full PK stack has been actively verified.

I also saved the summary as a report. If you want, send me Dr. Martinez’s email and I can format this into an email draft.
